title: Wearable AI gadget gets a photo app and gaming features
articleText: The consumer wearable update adds a social photo app, gaming features, and chatbot controls for shoppers. It does not describe cloud capacity, data center power, semiconductor supply, enterprise deployment, or infrastructure purchasing decisions.
